name: QBlock Puzzle
description: QBlock Puzzle - Addictive block game for fans of puzzles, jigsaw, and classic wooden block. Play QBlock Puzzle 10 minutes a day keep your mind sharp! Drag & drop the block to create full horizontal or vertical lines of block. Keep the board clean and beat your high score in QBlock Puzzle! It would easily help lower your stress, anxiety, and aid you to focus on anything else. QBlock Puzzle features: - 4 FREE beautiful themes: Wood, Cartoon, Day & Night. - Easy and simple, no pressure and no time limit. - Block rotation is available.
instructions: Drag and drop a block onto the board Fill an entire row or column to clear it Clearing lines gives you points and more space to keep playing If a block doesn rsquo t fit anywhere on the board the game ends
